title: woodwardia japonica
intro: Woodwardia japonica, also known as the Japanese chain fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Woodwardia japonica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Woodwardia japonica can be prepared as an herbal remedy through various methods, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
